title: Creepy Decorations
description: Add a chilling atmosphere to your world with a mod designed to bring horror-themed decorative blocks to Minecraft!
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
Add a chilling atmosphere to your world with **Creepy Decorations**, a mod designed to bring horror-themed decorative blocks to Minecraft. Whether you're building a haunted house, cursed village, or a nightmare-fueled adventure map, this mod helps set the tone with immersive, unsettling props.

## Current Decorations:
- **Haunted Pumpkin** – A sinister twist on the classic pumpkin, perfect for haunted gardens or eerie paths.
- **Broken Doll** – A cracked, abandoned doll that stares blankly—disturbing yet decorative.
- **Mossy Gravestone** – A worn and aged gravestone for cursed graveyards or forgotten resting places.
- **Old Wooden Cross** – A decaying wooden cross that fits graveyards, cult sites, or ruined chapels.
- **Leg Shackle** – A rusty restraint bolted to the floor. Great for dungeons, cells, or torture chambers.
- **Emerging Hand** – A creepy hand reaching out of the ground, as if something is trying to escape.

## Features:
- All blocks have crafting recipes using vanilla items (JEI-compatible for easy reference).
- Designed to work seamlessly in horror-themed modpacks like Cave Horror Project.
- Great for builders, map-makers, and anyone who wants to add a touch of darkness to their builds.

Chinese Simplified (zh_cn) translation contributed by Ansurfen
